topStories.title: US Adds 178,000 Jobs, More Than Expected, Unemployment Drops
topStories.description: An index of hiring plans among small businesses held steady in March at one of the lowest levels in recent years.

topStories.title: Congress Names 27 Candidates For Tamil Nadu Polls, State Chief Among Nominees
topStories.description: The Congress will contest 28 out of 234 Assembly seats in Tamil Nadu in a coalition with the ruling DMK.

topStories.title: How the US and Israel are waging war on Iran’s medicines, vaccines
topStories.description: The Pasteur Institute of Iran is one of several healthcare facilities in the country to be targeted.

topStories.title: As Iran claims downing second F-35 fighter jet, here is a look at US military aircraft lost during Operation Epic Fury
topStories.description: US military assets worth up to $2.9 billion have been lost as the Pentagon seeks $200 billion for operations. Iran asserts it shot down a US F-35, contradicting US Central Command's claim of an emergency landing. The conflict leads to significant military losses on both sides.

topStories.title: When will the Iran war end? Tracing the Trump administration's timelines
topStories.description: Experts say many US presidents have offered a timeline for a conflict - only to then shift their estimates.

topStories.title: Pam Bondi ouster: How Epstein Files plagued her time as US Attorney General—A timeline
topStories.description: Pam Bondi's term as US Attorney General ended with her dismissal by Trump amid controversy over the release of Epstein-related documents. Bondi dismissed criticism of how she handled the issue, while Trump lauded her as ‘a Great American Patriot and a loyal friend’.

dailyNews.title: ‘Hand over enemy pilot’: Iranian state TV affiliate claims a US pilot ejected from their aircraft over southwestern Iran
dailyNews.description: An on-screen crawl earlier urged the public to ‘shoot them if you see them,’ referring to social media footage circulating of what appeared to be US aircraft in the area, reports stated

dailyNews.title: B.P. Yatnal, expelled BJP leader, begins campaign for BJP nominee in Bagalkot
dailyNews.description: He did not criticise Umesh Meti, the Congress candidate; instead, he trained his guns on Chief Minister Siddaramaiah

dailyNews.title: US jobs surge unexpectedly in March despite Iran war
dailyNews.description: Employers added 178,000 jobs, far more than had expected, the Labor Department says.

dailyNews.title: Donald Trump's New Title For JD Vance: "Fraud Czar". What That Means
dailyNews.description: Trump said that the focus of his work will be "everywhere" but primarily in Democratic-run states, singling out California, Illinois and Minnesota.

dailyNews.title: Experts dispute US account of deadly Iran sports hall strike in Lamerd
dailyNews.description: Six weapons experts have contested the US claim that video evidence suggests an Iranian missile could have hit the hall.

dailyNews.title: Trump imposes 100% tariffs on patented pharma imports. Will move impact India?
dailyNews.description: The move primarily aims to pressure pharmaceutical companies to manufacture more in the United States.

dailyNews.title: Over 100 US legal experts condemn strikes on Iran as possible ‘war crimes’
dailyNews.description: United States-based scholars sign open letter raising concerns about conduct, rhetoric during US-Israeli war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: 'This has got me worried': Iranians fear what comes next after US strike on Karaj bridge
dailyNews.description: President Trump has warned Iran of strikes on bridges and electric power plants if its leaders do not agree to his terms to end the war.

dailyNews.title: At War With Iran Again, Some Israelis Fear Conflict Is Becoming Routine
dailyNews.description: A majority of Israelis support the war with Iran, but many doubt that it will solve Israel’s long-term security problems. Some also question their prime minister’s assurances and motives.

dailyNews.title: Rival Nations Seize On Choke Points to Counter Trump
dailyNews.description: From Iran to China, President Trump’s global aggression has encouraged other countries to search for new ways to pressure the U.S. economy.

dailyNews.title: How Pam Bondi Got Fired, and a Flood of Deadly New Drugs
dailyNews.description: Plus, your Friday news quiz.

dailyNews.title: Jobs and Workers Are In Balance. Nobody Is Happy About It.
dailyNews.description: Lower immigration has brought labor supply in line with shaky demand, but economists worry that such a slow-moving job market is at risk of toppling over.

dailyNews.title: Economists Are Drawing Stronger Connections Between A.I. and Jobs
dailyNews.description: Artificial intelligence hasn’t disrupted the labor market, economists say, but they are increasingly convinced that it will — and that policymakers are unprepared.

dailyNews.title: Pam Bondi Wanted a Graceful Exit. But Trump Wanted Her Gone.
dailyNews.description: Pam Bondi had a feeling her days as attorney general were numbered. But she didn’t expect President Trump to drop the curtain quite so soon.

dailyNews.title: Who Is Todd Blanche, Trump’s Acting Attorney General?
dailyNews.description: While it remains unclear how long Todd Blanche will stay in the job, whoever ends up taking over permanently will lead a department that he has shaped in his own image.

dailyNews.title: Wealthy Donors Are Hiding Political Money in Secretive Nonprofits
dailyNews.description: Using philanthropy for campaign donations is illegal. But an exception for some nonprofits has allowed Democratic billionaires like Bill Gates and Michael Bloomberg to remain anonymous when they want to play politics.

dailyNews.title: How Democrats Are Embracing Dark Money
dailyNews.description: The left is creating new, obscure nonprofits to funnel hundreds of millions of dollars into politics and advocacy.

topStories.title: The Awe of a Moon Launch in an Age of Trump, Turmoil and Tribal Divisions
topStories.description: The launch of Artemis II captured the tenor of the times in a country that can still do big things but seems forever mired in big problems.

topStories.title: As H-1B Visa Program Changes, Skilled Foreign Workers Consider Leaving U.S.
topStories.description: As the Trump administration cracks down on the H-1B visa program, which allows skilled workers like software engineers to work in the United States, foreign professionals are debating whether to stay and build careers or quit the American Dream.

topStories.description: Demand Justice plans to tie Republicans running for Senate this year to a possible fight to fill vacancies that could emerge on the Supreme Court.

dailyNews.description: Demand Justice plans to tie Republicans running for Senate this year to a possible fight to fill vacancies that could emerge on the Supreme Court.

dailyNews.title: JONATHAN TURLEY: Why Trump fired Bondi and chose this moment for a Justice Department reset
dailyNews.description: President Trump has a long history of firing Cabinet members, and Attorney General Pam Bondi is only the latest in a pattern of shakeups and swaps.

dailyNews.title: Trump's 2027 budget asks Congress for $1.5 trillion in defense spending
dailyNews.description: President Trump's new budget proposal asks Congress for $1.5 trillion in defense spending — a 42% increase — while cutting nondefense spending by $73 billion, or 10%.

dailyNews.title: Iran claims U.S. jet downed, hits Gulf states as Trump touts bridge strike
dailyNews.description: Iran claims it shot down a U.S. fighter jet and it continues attacking Persian Gulf oil and gas infrastructure after Trump's latest threat of "much more" to come.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo comments on Trump's Iran war during first Easter of papacy
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo is celebrating the first Easter of his papacy. CBS News' Chris Livesay reports.

dailyNews.title: Did Pam Bondi's handling of the Epstein files lead to Trump firing her?
dailyNews.description: President Trump's firing of Attorney General Pam Bondi is raising questions about their dynamic in the months prior. CBS News' Weijia Jiang reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to destroy Iranian infrastructure, saying its government 'knows what has to be done'
dailyNews.description: The threat comes a day after he said in a nationwide address that the U.S. military will be hitting Tehran "extremely hard" for the next two or three weeks.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
dailyNews.description: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

dailyNews.title: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi
dailyNews.description: President Trump was said to be unhappy with Pam Bondi's handling of DOJ files about Jeffrey Epstein and the DOJ's failure to prosecute his political enemies.

dailyNews.title: Analysis: Trump's Iran speech ignores the risks of a return to the 1970s
dailyNews.description: Oil shocks crippled past presidencies. The Iran war is putting Trump into the danger zone.

dailyNews.title: One year on from Trump's 'liberation day,' global investors are rethinking American exceptionalism
dailyNews.description: U.S. exceptionalism is "no longer automatic" among global investors, one market watcher told CNBC.

dailyNews.title: Tiger Woods called Trump after DUI crash, he told cop on bodycam video
dailyNews.description: President Trump called Tiger Woods a close friend after the golfer's auto crash in Jupiter, Fla., last week. Woods is dating the ex-wife of Donald Trump Jr.

dailyNews.title: Pam Bondi Responds After Trump Fires Her as Attorney General
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced on Thursday that he has fired Pam Bondi as Attorney General and said she will be transitioning to a “new job in the private sector.” Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche, who once served as Trump’s personal defense lawyer during his hush money trial in New York, is set to replace her as acting attorney general. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports and Kristen Welker, moderator of Meet the Press, joins TODAY with analysis.
